title: Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 1: The Freedon Nadd Uprising
content:
{{Top|rwm|old|italics=1}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:30AnnVol1Cover.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection
Volume 1: The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' |writer=[[Tom Veitch]] |penciller=[[Tony Akins]] |inker=[[Denis Rodier]] |letterer=[[Willie Schubert]] |colorist=[[Suzanne Bourdages]] |cover artist=[[Dave Dorman]] |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics|Dark Horse]] |release date=[[March 28]], [[2007]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/14-574/Star-Wars-30th-Anniversary-Collection-Volume-1--The-Freedon-Nadd-Uprising-HC|text=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 1--The Freedon Nadd Uprising HC}} |other date= |media type=Hardcover |pages=56 |isbn=1593077599 |isbn2= |timeline=[[3998 BBY]] |series=[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']]/[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection (comics)|30th Anniversary Collection]] |issues=1 |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 1: The Freedon Nadd Uprising''''' is the first of the [[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection (comics)|''Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection'']] [[Star Wars comic books|TPBs]], released on [[March 14]], [[2007|2006]]. It is a hardcover version of ''[[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising]]''. ==Publisher's summary== ''The planet Onderon, almost four thousand years before the Battle of Yavin and the events in ''A New Hope'': Freedon Nadd is dead, but his dark spirit lives on, and it has been used to abduct Jedi Master Arca! Nomi Sunrider and Ulic Qel-Droma lead the mission to free their Master, but not before the evil King Ommin spreads the seeds of Sith evil to a new generation…'' ''Out of print for a decade, this deluxe hardcover limited-edition of ''The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' kicks off Dark Horse's year-long celebration of the thirtieth anniversary of ''Star Wars''!'' ''Each month, the Star Wars 30th Anniversary Collection series will bring readers a limited-edition hardcover of the best of Dark Horse's ''Star Wars'' graphic novels. Available only through Direct Market retail outlets, each volume's print run is limited to initial orders and will not be reprinted.'' ==Contents== *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]] *[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:30AnnVol1Cover.jpg|Cover File:TOTJ_FNU1.jpg|Full cover art by [[Dave Dorman]] ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/comics/news20061006.html|text=January 2007 Comics (and More!)}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/14-574/Star-Wars-30th-Anniversary-Collection-Volume-1--The-Freedon-Nadd-Uprising-HC|text=Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection Volume 1--The Freedon Nadd Uprising HC}} {{TalesOfTheJediNav}} {{30th}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: ფრიდონ ნედის ამბოხი (საიუბილეო კოლექცია) |pl=30th Anniversary Collection Volume 1: The Freedon Nadd Uprising }} [[Category:Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection volumes|01]]
